narrative:
Precinct Urbana 2-A (precinct in Champaign County) has 1,125 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.7 percentage points.
